nasb.text: Then the elders of his city shall summon him and speak to him. And if he persists and says, ‘I do not desire to take her,’

esv.text: Then the elders of his city shall call him and speak to him, and if he persists, saying, ‘I do not wish to take her,’

cnv.text: 本城的長老就要把那人叫來，對他說明；如果他堅持說：‘我不樂意娶她’，

ccb.text: 长老们要把死者的兄弟召来，与他商谈。如果他执意不肯，
